title: Sweet Sorghum- dynamics of sugar yield in relation to different phenological stages
abstract:
Sweet sorghum (Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench) is one of the promising feedstock for
bioethanol production worldwide. It is a food-feed-fuel-industrial crop, which requires low water
and fertilizer input, has moderate grain yield and high yield of biomass for bio-refining and
industrial utilization......
